name: portfolio
description: Static personal portfolio template — Markdown content, custom Node build, no framework.

scripts.serve: node build.js && node -e "const h=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const root=p.join(process.cwd(),'dist');h.createServer((req,res)=>{let u=decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0]);let f=p.join(root,u);try{if(fs.statSync(f).isDirectory())f=p.join(f,'index.html');}catch(e){}fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.statusCode=404;res.end('404');return;}const t={'.html':'text/html','.css':'text/css','.js':'text/javascript','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.svg':'image/svg+xml'}[p.extname(f)]||'application/octet-stream';res.setHeader('content-type',t);res.end(d);});}).listen(8080,()=>console.log('serving dist/ at http://localhost:8080'));"
